questionHtml:
Which species are both Lewis and Brønsted–Lowry bases?

I.   CN−
II.  OH−
III. NH3


A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: Which species are both Lewis and Brønsted–Lowry bases? I. CN−II. OH−III. NH3 A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I, II and III
